name: Smashing Smashed Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the potatoes in a saucepan and cover with water.
2. Season with 1 teaspoon of the salt and 1/4 teaspoon of the black pepper.
3. Boil until fork tender, about 20 minutes.
4. Drain and return the potatoes to the pot.
5. Add the butter, garlic, and cream.
6. Using a fork, coarsely mash the potatoes and mix well.
7. Season with the remaining salt and black pepper and serve.
